# OneAPI Tools and SDKs | Zscaler Automation Hub

**Source:** https://automate.zscaler.com/docs/tools/oneapiintro
**Captured:** 2026-04-24 via Playwright MCP.

---

Complete suite of libraries and tools for interacting with the Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange.

## Postman Collection

Zscaler's Postman collection simplifies interaction with all API endpoints.

**Download:** https://automate.zscaler.com/downloads/OneAPI_postman_collection_03_05_2026.json

The collection:
- Includes pre-configured request scripts for authentication
- Includes prebuilt payloads and parameters where necessary
- Covers all APIs included in Zscaler OneAPI
- Includes all essential preset variables

Best for: API exploration, testing, and quick prototyping

### Postman Setup Guide Pages

- Installing and Configuring Postman: https://automate.zscaler.com/docs/tools/postman/installing-configuring-postman
- Adding OneAPI Postman Collection: https://automate.zscaler.com/docs/tools/postman/adding-oneapi-postman-collection
